name: visualDet3D
description: Official Repo for Ground-aware Monocular 3D Object Detection for Autonomous Driving / YOLOStereo3D: A Step Back to 2D for Efficient Stereo 3D Detection
narratorHint: Monocular 3D detection, stereo 3D detection, all in one.

name: ros2_vision_inference
description: unified multi-threading inferencing nodes for monocular 3D object detection, depth prediction and semantic segmentation
narratorHint: ROS2 nodes for 3D detection, depth, and segmentation — all in one.

name: FSNet
description: Full Scale Monocular Depth Prediction. Official Implementation of "FSNet: Redesign Self-Supervised MonoDepth for Full-Scale Depth Prediction for Autonomous Driving" https://arxiv.org/abs/2304.10719
narratorHint: FSNet — "full scale" is both a feature and a pun.

name: papers_reading_sharing.github.io
description: Sites to share deep learning related papers and their digests
narratorHint: Paper reading blog. Have you read a paper today?

name: visionfactory
description: Open source training framework for vision tasks. Scales up on data and scales up on tasks. Official Implementation for https://arxiv.org/abs/2310.00920
narratorHint: visionfactory — the flexible training playground. Scales up on data, scales up on tasks.

name: visualDet3D_ros
description: A naive ROS interface for visualDet3D.
narratorHint: ROS wrapper for visualDet3D — because your 3D detector deserves to live in ROS too.

name: nuscenes_visualize
description: Visualize nuScenes sequences on ROS with full tf support.
narratorHint: nuScenes in ROS1 with full TF tree. Are you still using ROS1?

name: kitti_visualize
description: Visualize KITTI sequences and object detection benchmark on ROS with full tf support.
narratorHint: KITTI object detection benchmark on ROS — the OG dataset, still going strong.

name: everyday_my_arxiv
description: Use LLM and arxiv reader to obtain arxiv paper every day; Please check Wiki page or the ReadingCollectionWebsite
narratorHint: One paper a day, keep the Dr. away. This pipeline feeds my INTEL feed on this site.

name: ros2_dataset_bridge
description: ROS2 Python Package for visualizing KITTI/KITTI360/nuScenes datasets in RVIZ2
narratorHint: ROS2 tools for visualizing KITTI, KITTI360, and nuScenes in RVIZ2. PhD survival kit.

name: kitti360_visualize
description: Visualize KITTI360 sequences on ROS with full tf support.
narratorHint: KITTI360 on ROS — because why not go 360 degrees with your research?

name: monodepth_ros
description: MonoDepth ROS Node. Used with FSNet https://github.com/Owen-Liuyuxuan/FSNet
narratorHint: MonoDepth as a ROS node — pairs with FSNet for real-world depth inference.

name: openclaw_vscode
description: Chat with Local OpenClaw in VSCode
narratorHint: Chat with OpenClaw directly inside VSCode — because switching windows is for quitters.

name: Hacking_dbw_mkz
description: Hacking into Dataspeed ADAS Development Vehicle Kit. Try to open up the semi-open-source simulation.
narratorHint: Hacking the Dataspeed ADAS kit — reverse engineering when you can't get the source. Early-adopter energy.

name: localPDFSummarizer
description: a purely simple local attempt for summarizing academic PDF with learning-based tool-box.
narratorHint: Say NO to cloud-AI Companies!

name: paper-helper-server
narratorHint: AI Q&A server behind my paper reading blog — ask questions, get answers

name: gemini_paper2slide
description: A full Gemini implementation of paper2slide
narratorHint: Gemini reads papers and spits out slides — too lazy to make them myself? No more.

name: sam3d_uv_float16
description: SAM3D Half, tested in 4090 with daily desktop ubuntu memory occupied.
narratorHint: SAM3D Half, tested in 4090 with daily desktop ubuntu memory occupied. Written in Python.

name: SRTP_Predicting_Knee_Joint_Angle
narratorHint: Written in C.

name: Road-sign-Arrow-Recognition
description: First time use Tensorflow to recognize simple road sign. Images are classified as 5 classes.
narratorHint: First time use Tensorflow to recognize simple road sign. Images are classified as 5 classes. Written in Python.
